## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like. Be as detailed as you can. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? What are their trade-offs? -->

## Zero-knowledge check

<!-- Morrigan is a zero-knowledge platform. Does this feature preserve that property? 
     If it requires Morrigan to access user data, it will not be accepted. 
     If you're unsure, describe your thinking and we'll discuss it. -->

- [ ] This feature does not require Morrigan's servers to access plaintext user data
- [ ] I have considered the privacy and security implications
